llm_eval.notes: compiles; imports validate/check/detect resolve; read-only gate (no destructive ops); distinct exit codes 0/1/2 and stderr reasons; broad except Exception blocks all return structured {ok:false,reason} so failures surfaced not swallowed; minor smells: check_db_match ignores its intake param (dead arg) and repeated sys.path.insert; no frontmatter per package convention
